summary: Conversation Flow Audit - Vault Detection Testing. Verified 4 key conversation flows route to correct vault types. Backend returns correct data structures: nearby_places for restaurants, tip_card for meal plans, CONCIERGE execution for dog walker. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%).
critical_code_review_comments: FIX VERIFIED: nearby_places handling in MiraDemoPage.jsx lines 2366-2385 - places are now correctly stored in miraPicks.places state
FIX VERIFIED: VaultManager.jsx lines 66-68 correctly detects PLACES vault when miraResponse has places or nearby_places
FIX VERIFIED: PicksIndicator counts places + products + services + tipCard (line 3304)
FIX VERIFIED: VaultManager receives places data via miraResponse prop (lines 3639-3640)
Backend correctly returns: Pet cafe query → nearby_places with restaurants (type: restaurants)
Backend correctly returns: Birthday cake query → asks clarifying questions first (INSTANT, no products yet)
Backend correctly returns: Meal plan query → tip_card with type meal_plan (CONCIERGE, 0 products)
Backend correctly returns: Dog walker query → execution_type CONCIERGE, suggest_concierge: true

success_rate.frontend: UI loads correctly, conversation flows work as expected

seed_data_creation: None - tests use real API responses
context_for_next_testing_agent: Conversation flow vault routing fully tested. Key flows verified: 1) Pet cafe → nearby_places with restaurants (PlacesVault), 2) Birthday cake → asks clarifying questions first per golden standards, 3) Meal plan → tip_card generation (TipCardVault), 4) Dog walker → CONCIERGE execution type. Frontend miraPicks state correctly stores places from nearby_places response. VaultManager correctly detects PLACES vault type.

pet_cafe_query.actual: nearby_places returned with 3 restaurants in Mumbai

birthday_cake_query.expected: PicksVault with products in celebrate pillar
birthday_cake_query.actual: First asks clarifying questions (per golden standards), then shows products

rca_of_the_issue: The original bug was that nearby_places (restaurants, cafes) returned by backend was NOT being stored in miraPicks state. The fix added explicit handling at MiraDemoPage.jsx lines 2366-2385 to store places in miraPicks.places and set activeVaultData with nearby_places. VaultManager was updated to detect PLACES vault type when nearby_places is present.
